mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, name, description, schema_version, data_source_id, template_config, created_by, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted, deleted_at, status FROM report_metadata WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = false
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO report_metadata (tenant_id, name, description, schema_version, data_source_id, template_config, created_by, status, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{schemaVersion}, #{dataSourceId}, #{templateConfig}, #{createdBy}, #{status}, #{isDeleted}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE report_metadata SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, schema_version = #{schemaVersion}, data_source_id = #{dataSourceId}, template_config = #{templateConfig}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted}, deleted_at = #{deletedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
